Source   Edit  

Imports

common, readerdef, objvar

Procs

proc eatChar(reader: var JsonReader; c: char) {.inline,
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Will consume space before and then the character c. Will raise an exception if c is not found. Source   Edit   
proc fromJson(s: string): JsonNode {.inline, ...raises: [Exception, JsonValueError,
    JsonParseError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Takes json parses it into JsonNodes. Source   Edit   
proc fromJson[T](s: string; x: typedesc[T]): T {.inline.}
Takes json and outputs the object it represents.
  • Extra json fields are ignored.
  • Missing json fields keep their default values.
  • proc newHook(foo: var ...) Can be used to populate default values.
Source   Edit   
proc parseSymbol(reader: var JsonReader): string {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Will read a symbol and return it. Used for numbers and booleans. Source   Edit   
proc peekKind(reader: var JsonReader): JsonNodeKind {.
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonParseError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
guesses which kind the next object is, assumes spaces are skipped not guaranteed to be accurate, all numbers are assumed float Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var bool) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Will parse boolean true or false. Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var char) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonValueError, JsonParseError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var JsonNode) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonValueError, JsonParseError, JsonValueError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var RawJson) {.inline,
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonValueError, JsonParseError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var SomeFloat)
Will parse float32 and float64. Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var SomeSignedInt)
Will parse signed integers. Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var SomeUnsignedInt)
Will parse unsigned integers. Source   Edit   
proc read(reader: var JsonReader; v: var string) {....raises: [Exception,
    JsonValueError, Exception, JsonValueError, JsonParseError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc read[T: array](reader: var JsonReader; v: var T)
Source   Edit   
proc read[T: distinct](reader: var JsonReader; v: var T) {.inline.}
Source   Edit   
proc read[T: enum](reader: var JsonReader; v: var T)
Source   Edit   
proc read[T: not object](reader: var JsonReader; v: var ref T)
Source   Edit   
proc read[T: object | ref object](reader: var JsonReader; v: var T)
Source   Edit   
proc read[T: tuple](reader: var JsonReader; v: var T)
Source   Edit   
proc read[T](reader: var JsonReader; v: var seq[T])
Source   Edit   
proc readKind(reader: var JsonReader): JsonNodeKind {.inline,
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonParseError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
guesses which kind the next object is, skips spaces not guaranteed to be accurate,all numbers are assumed float Source   Edit   
proc skipValue(reader: var JsonReader): int {.
    ...raises: [Exception, JsonValueError, JsonParseError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Used to skip values of extra fields. returns start position in buffer Source   Edit

template eatSpace(reader: var JsonReader)
